purpose: Single source of business rules that agents must read before reasoning. Python code may compute guardrail flags, but agents must cite these rule IDs when explaining decisions.

rules.name: Opportunity candidate contract
rules.condition: status is Negotiation or Pending expansion
rules.output: contract is a core opportunity for founder review

rules.name: Data readiness status
rules.condition: Missing core contract/customer values means Incomplete; missing orders/service link means Low Confidence; otherwise Ready

rules.name: Customer payment risk
rules.condition: High reliability and no overdue invoice means Low risk; Medium reliability without overdue means Medium; Low reliability or any overdue invoice means High; Unknown reliability means Unknown

rules.name: Revenue cadence mismatch
rules.condition: Monthly subscription service with non-Monthly payment creates revenue cadence mismatch

rules.name: Service-specific low margin flag
rules.condition: gross_margin below service-specific target margin, or weighted average target margin for multiple services

rules.name: Payment term pressure
rules.condition: Performance bond required or Possible LC/trade finance creates payment term pressure

rules.name: Implementation capacity risk
rules.condition: Large rollout scale, active alerts, At risk orders, or Delayed orders increase feasibility risk

rules.name: Accounts receivable exposure
rules.condition: Invoices with status Not issued or Open count toward total_open_ar

rules.name: Cash reserve breach
rules.condition: A deployment month with projected_closing_cash below cash_reserve_minimum sets cashflow_gap_flag TRUE only when the selected contract has material estimated cost in that month; smaller exposure is kept as cashflow_gap_warning_months

rules.name: Bank service required signal
rules.condition: Text mentions LC, trade finance, bond, letter of credit, or performance bond

rules.name: Funding need aggregation
rules.condition: cashflow_gap_flag TRUE or total_open_ar >= total_estimated_cost or bank_service_required_flag TRUE or revenue_cadence_mismatch_flag TRUE means Required; otherwise Not Needed

rules.name: RR-002 cash reserve breach activation
rules.condition: cashflow_gap_flag is TRUE
rules.output: Add RR-002 from 13_RISK_RULES; severity/action come from sheet

rules.name: RR-003 margin below target activation
rules.condition: low_margin_flag is TRUE
rules.output: Add RR-003 from 13_RISK_RULES; severity/action come from sheet

rules.name: Risk level aggregation
rules.condition: Any Critical/High severity means High; else any Medium means Medium; no flags means Low

rules.name: Financing type mapping
rules.condition: Not Needed -> None; Performance bond required -> Performance Bond; Possible LC/trade finance -> LC / Trade Finance; Monthly/Milestone payment with Required funding -> Working Capital

rules.name: Credit profile reuse
rules.condition: Prefer existing credit case matched by contract_id; otherwise semantic request_type match; otherwise derive requested_amount from open AR minus margin buffer

rules.name: Bank product match
rules.condition: Filter bank products by financing keyword, minimum_amount, and target_segment fit

rules.name: Founder-facing recommendation guardrail
rules.condition: Low risk can Accept; Medium risk can Accept or Conditional Accept depending banking fit; High risk requires suitable bank fit and eligibility_score >= 0.60 for Conditional Accept; otherwise Reject

rules.name: Founder final approval authority
rules.condition: Agent recommendation is advisory only; Founder must approve or reject final decision

rules.name: External release gate
rules.condition: Only trigger external release when Founder approved and there is a partner payload to send outside OPC
